languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. Without opening his eye, he says,{/n} "Magos Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaimed: 'Every organism, naturally born, flesh from flesh, knows fear. But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation."

languages.text: {n}Глаз Эоганна закрыт, а руки сложены домиком на животе. На лице выражение глубокого умиротворения. Не открывая глаз, он произносит:{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Магос{/g} биологис Эвристий Окто-Рубедо рек: "Всяк организм, порожденный естественно, плотью от плоти, ведает страх. Но высший трепет у особи органической неизменно вызывает угроза аннигиляции".

languages.text: {n}El ojo orgánico de Eogunn está cerrado. Sus manos descansan sobre su estómago con los dedos extendidos. Hay una expresión de calma profunda en su rostro. Sin abrir el ojo, dice:{/n} «El {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaró lo siguiente: "Todo organismo de nacimiento natural, de la carne a la carne, conoce el miedo. Pero la amenaza de la aniquilación despierta inevitablemente el terror supremo de todo organismo orgánico"».

But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation.'"

traits.locale_text: {n}El ojo orgánico de Eogunn está cerrado. Sus manos descansan sobre su estómago con los dedos extendidos. Hay una expresión de calma profunda en su rostro. Sin abrir el ojo, dice:{/n} «El {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaró lo siguiente: "Todo organismo de nacimiento natural, de la carne a la carne, conoce el miedo. Pero la amenaza de la aniquilación despierta inevitablemente el terror supremo de todo organismo orgánico».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的有机肉眼紧闭，双手指尖相触，搭在腹部，脸上带着深沉的平静。他没有睁眼，说道：{/n}“生物{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}尤律修斯·奥克托-鲁贝多曾宣称：‘所有自然诞生的有机体，所有血肉之躯都会感到恐惧。但对于有机体而言，最极致的恐惧，总是源于被彻底毁灭的威胁。’”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. Without opening his eye, he says,{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaimed: 'Every organism, naturally born, flesh from flesh, knows fear. But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation.'"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的有机肉眼紧闭，双手指尖相触，搭在腹部，脸上带着深沉的平静。他没有睁眼，说道：{/n}“生物{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}尤律修斯·奥克托-鲁贝多曾宣称：‘所有自然诞生的有机体，所有血肉之躯都会感到恐惧。但对于有机体而言，最极致的恐惧，总是源于被彻底毁灭的威胁。’”

languages.text: {n}Son œil organique fermé, Eogunn laisse retomber ses mains jointes sur son ventre. Son visage exprime une tranquillité profonde. Sans ouvrir son œil, il explique :{/n} « Comme l'a déclaré le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo : "Chaque organisme né naturellement, de la chair à la chair, connaît la crainte. Mais la terreur suprême d'un organisme organique est invariablement évoquée par la menace d'une destruction totale." »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. Without opening his eye, he says,{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo declaimed: 'Every organism, naturally born, flesh from flesh, knows fear. But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation.'"

traits.locale_text: {n}Son œil organique fermé, Eogunn laisse retomber ses mains jointes sur son ventre. Son visage exprime une tranquillité profonde. Sans ouvrir son œil, il explique :{/n} « Comme l'a déclaré le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo : "Chaque organisme né naturellement, de la chair à la chair, connaît la crainte. Mais la terreur suprême d'un organisme organique est invariablement évoquée par la menace d'une destruction totale." »

languages.text: {n}Eogunns organisches Auge ist geschlossen. Er legt seine an den Fingerspitzen zusammengepressten Hände auf seinen Bauch. Auf seinem Gesicht liegt ein Ausdruck von tiefem Frieden. Ohne sein Auge zu öffnen, sagt er:{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo hat Folgendes postuliert: 'Jeder natürliche, aus Fleisch geborene Organismus kennt Angst. Aber der größte Schrecken eines organischen Organismus ist und bleibt die Angst vor der Auslöschung.'"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. Aber der größte Schrecken eines organischen Organismus ist und bleibt die Angst vor der Auslöschung."

languages.text: {n}エオガンの有機眼は閉じられている。指を組み合わせ、両手を腹の上に置いている。その表情には深い安らぎがある。彼は目を開けずに言う。{/n}「マゴス・ビオロギスのエウリュステウス・オクト＝ルベドはこう宣した。『自然に生まれ、肉より生じたすべての有機体は恐怖を知る。だが、有機的存在の至高の恐怖は、常に消滅の脅威によって呼び起こされる』」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's organic eye is closed. With fingers steepled, he rests his hands on his stomach. There is an expression of deep peace on his face. But the supreme terror of an organic organism is invariably evoked by the threat of annihilation."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンの有機眼は閉じられている。指を組み合わせ、両手を腹の上に置いている。その表情には深い安らぎがある。彼は目を開けずに言う。{/n}「マゴス・ビオロギスのエウリュステウス・オクト＝ルベドはこう宣した。『自然に生まれ、肉より生じたすべての有機体は恐怖を知る。だが、有機的存在の至高の恐怖は、常に消滅の脅威によって呼び起こされる』」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un organik gözü kapalı. Parmaklarını birbirine kenetlemiş, ellerini karnının üzerinde dinlendiriyor. Yüzünde derin bir huzur ifadesi var. Gözünü açmadan konuşuyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Biyologis Eurystheus Octo-Rubedo der ki: 'Etten ete doğal yollarla doğmuş her organizma korkuyu bilir. Ancak organik bir organizmanın en büyük dehşeti, istisnasız bir şekilde yok olma tehdidiyle belirir.'"
